dashboard.subtitle: Real-time monitoring of your multi-account AI infrastructure and gateway performance.
dashboard.noDataTrend: Start testing or connect clients to collect data...

usage.title: Usage Intelligence Center
usage.subtitle: Full-dimensional consumption audit, performance analysis, and expense monitoring.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.subtitle: Control your local gateway parameters.
settings.portDesc: The TCP port LLMux runs on. Default is 25975.
settings.autoUpdateDesc: Periodically fetch fresh model lists from providers.
settings.themeDesc: Switch between dark and light modes.
settings.frequencyDesc: How often to pool metrics from the gateway.
settings.purgeDesc: Clear all locally stored session keys and aliases.
settings.purgeConfirmTitle: [DANGEROUS] Are you sure you want to completely reset the system and clear the database?
settings.wipeLogs: 4. All historical usage stats and logs
settings.purgeIrreversible: This action cannot be undone, the system will return to its initial state.
settings.exportDesc: Export accounts, aliases and keys as a JSON file
settings.exportWarning: ⚠️ API Keys will be exported in plain text. Keep the file safe and do not share it!
settings.importDesc: Import from JSON file. Existing items with same name will be overwritten
settings.invalidPort: The port number must be between 1024 and 65535. Please try again.
settings.reservedPort: This port is reserved for common database or web services. Please choose another port to avoid conflicts.
settings.restartDesc: Service port updated successfully. To apply these changes, please manually stop the running LLMux process and restart it.

about.title: Unified AI Gateway Engine
about.desc: LLMux is a professional-grade multi-account gateway designed for local access to all your favorite LLMs.

features.speedDesc: Zero overhead local proxying. Your models, your speed, no middleman latency.
features.privacyDesc: Local data storage. We never transmit your sensitive keys to any external servers.
features.agnosticDesc: Native support for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and custom endpoints.
features.multiDesc: Switch between multiple accounts and API providers seamlessly.

about.madeWith: Made with heart by LLMux Team

accounts.title: Account Management
accounts.subtitle: Securely manage your AI provider API Keys locally.
accounts.addFirst: Click the button above to add your first AI provider key.
accounts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete account "{{name}}"? This will PERMANENTLY erase the account and all associated history, usage logs, and request statistics. This action cannot be undone!
accounts.deleteWarning: Warning: This will wipe all traces of this account from the system.
accounts.deleteWarningDetail: * It's recommended to export your history before deletion. Once confirmed, all records in the local database will be permanently wiped.
accounts.keyEncrypted: Your keys are encrypted locally and never leave your device.
accounts.validationFailed: Validation failed: Could not fetch any models from this account. Please check your API Key and Base URL.

models.title: Model Management
models.subtitle: Explore available models and manage custom aliases.
models.aliasSubtitle: Create short, memorable aliases for long model IDs.
models.availableSubtitle: Live detected models from your enabled accounts.

filter.searchPlaceholder: Filter by name, provider or tag...

models.testAllDesc: Test all filtered models sequentially in backend
models.noModelsFound: No models found in this provider

setup.title: Quick Setup
setup.subtitle: Pick your tool and API key, then copy the config to connect to the LLMux gateway.

auth.webSubtitle: Import via browser session (No API Key needed).
auth.synced: Synced! You can close this wizard now.
auth.syncFailed: Sync failed. Ensure you are logged into the official site.

script.tokenCookie: ⚠️ API failed, trying to read from Cookies...
script.interceptor: 🕵️ Cookies protected. Please [Click any chat] or [Refresh page] to sync session!
script.notFound: ❌ Token not found! Ensure you are logged in.

keys.apiDesc: Integrate with any OpenAI-compatible application (like NextChat, LobeChat, etc.) by overriding the default endpoint. Use the Base URL below along with one of your API Keys.
keys.keyCreated: Key generated successfully! Please copy it to configure your client applications.
keys.noAliasesHint: No aliases available. Please create model aliases in [Model Management] first.
keys.emptyAuthDesc: The following keys have no valid model permissions (all referenced aliases were deleted). They are currently UNUSABLE. Please re-edit them:
keys.title: API Key Management
keys.subtitle: Generate and manage client keys used to access this gateway.
keys.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete key "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone, and associated clients will lose access.
